artPrompt: The dramatic moment of a rigged spin: a great wheel of fortune blurs in motion, its blank segments smeared into a hot-gold ring, a clawed hand frozen mid-flick at its rim as a single peg ticks toward doom, firelit faces leaning in from the smoky edges. Ember sparks scatter. Wide landscape, carnival red and hot gold washes bleeding into black. Rendered as loose ink-and-watercolor — confident brush linework, bleeding translucent washes, a limited palette, generous negative space.
name: Spin the Wheel of Misfortune
text:
Roll a six-sided die.
1 — Spin the Wheel of Misfortune deals 1 damage to you. Womp womp.
2 or 3 — it deals 3 damage to any target.
4 or 5 — it deals 5 damage divided as you choose among any number of targets.
6 — JACKPOT. It deals 6 damage to any target and you create three Treasure tokens.
flavorText: The wheel clicks past JACKPOT, past JACKPOT, and lands square on BANKRUPT. Every time.
